# ResurgenceBuilds.com

> The top independent resource hub for The Division Resurgence — builds, guides, exotic weapons, patch notes, and Dark Zone intel.

## Site Purpose
ResurgenceBuilds.com is an ad-free, community-driven wiki for The Division Resurgence mobile/PC game by Ubisoft. We provide in-game tested builds, weapon databases, gear set references, and patch note analysis.

## Content Overview
- /builds/ — Optimized meta and off-meta loadouts for all 5 specializations (Vanguard, Demolitionist, Field Medic, Tech Operator, Bulwark)
- /news/ — Developer stream summaries, patch analysis, community sentiment
- /patch-notes/ — Detailed patch note breakdowns with build impact analysis
- /database/ — Weapon talents, gear set effects, OS protocols, exotic weapons, skill mod combos, bonus attributes
- /builder/ — Interactive build planner tool

## Game Details
- Game: The Division Resurgence
- Developer: Ubisoft Bucharest
- Publisher: Ubisoft Mobile
- Platforms: iOS, Android, PC (Ubisoft Connect Early Access)
- Current Season: Season 1, Phase 2 (May 2026)
- Current Patch: 1.2.1 (May 20, 2026)

## Specializations
- Vanguard (subclasses: Commando, Recon)
- Demolitionist (subclasses: HE Grenade, Flashguard)
- Bulwark (subclasses: Juggernaut, Breacher)
- Field Medic (subclasses: Combat Medicine, Tactical Pharma)
- Tech Operator (subclasses: Offensive, Aegis)

## Exotic Weapons (Current)
- Lady Death (SMG) — Talent: Breathe Free
- Warlord (Assault Rifle) — Talent: Play Rough
- Strawberry Milkshake (LMG) — Talent: Anarchy (buff pending)
- Scorpio (upcoming Phase 3, June 2026)

## Contact
- Author: RapidF5
- Site: https://resurgencebuilds.com
